slides.title: [Brand / ProductName]
slides.notes: 开场，建立品牌基调。保持安静，让视觉先说话。1–2 句介绍背景即可。

slides.title: We started because[the world needed X]
slides.notes: 讲公司/产品诞生的故事。要有人情味，要具体，避免空洞的使命宣言。

slides.title: [The core problem in one crisp, human sentence]

items.title: [Problem Dimension 1]
items.desc: [Supporting evidence or statistic. Be specific — cite a number or real example.]

items.title: [Problem Dimension 2]
items.desc: [Second angle on the problem — the hidden cost, the workaround people use today.]

items.title: [Problem Dimension 3]
items.desc: [Why existing solutions fail — what gap or frustration persists despite alternatives.]

items.title: The Opportunity
items.desc: [The market gap that your approach addresses — sets up the solution reveal.]

slides.notes: 问题越真实越好。用数据锚定规模，用故事增加情感重量。避免过度技术化。

slides.title: Introducing [Product / Solution Name]
items: [Key differentiator 1 — the thing no one else does]
[Key differentiator 2 — the design choice that surprised users]
[Key differentiator 3 — the integration or workflow that saves time]
slides.notes: 解决方案幻灯片要简洁有力。一句话定义你做什么，然后用三点说明为什么它有效。

slides.title: Built for [customer type]

items.title: [Feature 1]
items.desc: [What it does and why it matters. One or two sentences — be concrete, not abstract.]

items.title: [Feature 2]
items.desc: [The unique insight or technique. Mention the result the user gets, not just the method.]

items.title: [Feature 3]
items.desc: [The "wait, it does that too?" moment. The delightful unexpected capability.]

items.title: [Feature 4]
items.desc: [An integration or ecosystem play — how it fits into the customer's existing workflow.]

items.title: [Feature 5]
items.desc: [A reliability or trust-building feature — security, uptime, compliance, support.]

slides.notes: 每个功能卡片对应解决一个痛点。功能名称要动词开头（'Automate', 'Connect', 'Visualize'）。

slides.title: The numbers thattell our story
slides.notes: 用最具冲击力的数字开场。每个数字后面要有一行解释为什么它重要，不只是展示数字。

slides.title: The world we'rebuilding toward

items.title: [Near-term milestone — 6 months]
items.desc: [Specific capability or outcome. Something concrete and testable.]

items.title: [Mid-term vision — 1–2 years]
items.desc: [The platform expansion or ecosystem play that 10× the impact.]

items.title: [Long-term moonshot]
items.desc: [The audacious bet — the thing that makes people lean forward when you say it.]

slides.notes: 愿景幻灯片要抬头望远，但不要空泛。什么样的世界是你们在建设的？具体说出两三件今天还不存在、但你们在努力实现的事情。

slides.quote: "[A powerful customer quote that captures the transformation in their own words — before/after format works best here]"
slides.notes: 这是一个呼吸的幻灯片。读引言，停顿，让它沉淀。接着说'这是 [客户名字] 告诉我们的'。

slides.title: Ready to try[Product Name]?
slides.notes: 结尾要有单一、清晰的行动号召。URL 要足够简短可以记住。提供一个立即行动的理由（早鸟优惠、有限名额、限时活动）。
